problem id: 6818b555
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(7) XOR SHR(7)) AND ROT(7)

examples:
  01101110 -> 00000000
  10001011 -> 10000001
  10010110 -> 00000001
  10101110 -> 00000001
  00101000 -> 00000000
  01111110 -> 00000000
  00110101 -> 10000000
  10101100 -> 00000000
  11011010 -> 00000001
  00101100 -> 00000000

query: 11000101
predicted answer: 10000000
